item.title: First reading, referred to Ways & Means.
item.description: First reading, referred to Ways & Means.

item.title: 👍Ben Buchholz - Far West Agribusiness Association, NW Agricultural Cooperative Council, WA Friends, NW Grain Growers
item.description: Ben Buchholz signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Far West Agribusiness Association, NW Agricultural Cooperative Council, WA Friends, NW Grain Growers.

item.title: 👍💵Mark Streuli - WA Wheat Growers Assoc., WA Potato and Onion Assoc.
item.description: Mark Streuli signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent WA Wheat Growers Assoc., WA Potato and Onion Assoc.. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👍Matthew Ewers - Private Testimony - IEDS Logistics
item.description: Matthew Ewers signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Private Testimony - IEDS Logistics.

item.title: Minority; without recommendation.
item.description: Minority; without recommendation.

item.title: Passed to Rules Committee for second reading.
item.description: Passed to Rules Committee for second reading.
item.guid: 2026-02-09/Passed to Rules Committee for second reading.

item.title: WM - Majority; do pass.
item.description: WM - Majority; do pass.

item.title: Placed on second reading by Rules Committee.
item.description: Placed on second reading by Rules Committee.
item.guid: 2026-02-12/Placed on second reading by Rules Committee.

item.title: Rules suspended. Placed on Third Reading.
item.description: Rules suspended. Placed on Third Reading.

item.title: Third reading, passed; yeas, 48; nays, 1; absent, 0; excused, 0.
item.description: Third reading, passed; yeas, 48; nays, 1; absent, 0; excused, 0.
item.guid: 2026-02-16/Third reading, passed; yeas, 48; nays, 1; absent, 0; excused, 0.

item.title: First reading, referred to Finance.
item.description: First reading, referred to Finance.

item.title: 👍Ben Buchholz - Far West Agribusiness Association, WA Friends of Farms and Forests, Northwest Grain Growers
item.description: Ben Buchholz signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Far West Agribusiness Association, WA Friends of Farms and Forests, Northwest Grain Growers.

item.title: 👍Matthew Ewers - Self - IEDS Logistics
item.description: Matthew Ewers signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Self - IEDS Logistics.

item.title: FIN - Executive action taken by committee.
item.description: FIN - Executive action taken by committee.

item.title: FIN - Majority; do pass.
item.description: FIN - Majority; do pass.

item.title: Minority; without recommendation.
item.description: Minority; without recommendation.

item.title: Referred to Rules 2 Review.
item.description: Referred to Rules 2 Review.

item.title: Rules Committee relieved of further consideration. Placed on second reading.
item.description: Rules Committee relieved of further consideration. Placed on second reading.
item.guid: 2026-03-03/Rules Committee relieved of further consideration. Placed on second reading.

item.title: President signed.
item.description: President signed.

item.title: Rules suspended. Placed on Third Reading.
item.description: Rules suspended. Placed on Third Reading.

item.title: Speaker signed.
item.description: Speaker signed.

item.title: Third reading, passed; yeas, 79; nays, 18; absent, 0; excused, 1.
item.description: Third reading, passed; yeas, 79; nays, 18; absent, 0; excused, 1.
